ex.jp: 親指を立てて合図した。
ex.en: I gave a thumbs-up as a signal.

qs.s: スマホを片手で操作すると、＿＿＿＿が疲れる。
qs.en: Operating a smartphone with one hand tires out the thumb.
qs.e: 親指 = the thumb (also big toe). 小指(こゆび) = the little finger/pinky. 人差し指(ひとさしゆび) = the index finger. 手首 = the wrist.

qs.s: 「親指」の意味は？
qs.e: 親指 is the thumb (足の親指 = the big toe). The 'parent finger' — 親 (parent) + 指 (finger).

m: each time; every time; (shop greeting) thanks for your patronage

ex.jp: 毎度ありがとうございます。
ex.en: Thank you for your continued patronage.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿同じ間違いを繰り返しては、信用を失うよ。
qs.en: If you repeat the same mistake every time, you'll lose trust.
qs.e: 毎度 = every time/each time (also a shopkeeper's greeting). 時々(ときどき) = sometimes/now and then. たまに = occasionally. めったに = (with neg.) rarely.

qs.s: 「毎度」の意味は？
qs.e: 毎度 means every single time (毎度のことながら = as always). It's also a common shop greeting (毎度どうも = thanks as always).

ex.jp: 子どもが風船を膨らませている。
ex.en: The child is blowing up a balloon.

qs.s: パーティーの会場は、色とりどりの＿＿＿＿で飾られていた。
qs.en: The party venue was decorated with colorful balloons.
qs.e: 風船(ふうせん) = a balloon. 風車(かざぐるま) = a pinwheel/windmill. 凧(たこ) = a kite. 花火 = fireworks.

qs.s: 「風船」の意味は？
qs.e: 風船 is a balloon (風船が割れる = the balloon pops, ゴム風船 = a rubber balloon).

ex.jp: 武士は刀を大切にした。
ex.en: The samurai prized their swords.

qs.s: 江戸時代、＿＿＿＿は特別な身分として扱われた。
qs.en: In the Edo period, warriors were treated as a special class.
qs.e: 武士(ぶし) = a warrior/samurai. 農民(のうみん) = a peasant/farmer. 商人(しょうにん) = a merchant. 貴族(きぞく) = the nobility/aristocrat.

qs.s: 「武士」の意味は？
qs.e: 武士 is a samurai/warrior (武士道 = bushido, the warrior code). ≒ 侍(さむらい).

m: deep emotion; being deeply moved; thrill of gratitude

ex.jp: 温かい励ましの言葉に感激した。
ex.en: I was deeply moved by the warm words of encouragement.

qs.s: 久しぶりの再会に、二人は涙を流して＿＿＿＿した。
qs.en: At their reunion after so long, the two were moved to tears.
qs.e: 感激 = being deeply moved/overcome with emotion (often joy or gratitude). 感心 = admiration/being impressed (by someone's quality). 失望 = disappointment. 後悔 = regret.

qs.s: 「感激」の意味は？
o: deep emotion; being deeply moved (with joy/gratitude)
qs.e: 感激 is being powerfully moved emotionally (感激のあまり = out of sheer emotion, 感激屋 = someone easily moved). Stronger than 感動.

ex.jp: 祖父の葬式に親族が集まった。
ex.en: Relatives gathered for my grandfather's funeral.

qs.s: 喪服を着て、知人の＿＿＿＿に参列した。
qs.en: Wearing mourning clothes, I attended an acquaintance's funeral.
qs.e: 葬式(そうしき) = a funeral. 結婚式 = a wedding ceremony. 入学式 = a school entrance ceremony. 卒業式 = a graduation ceremony.

qs.s: 「葬式」の意味は？
qs.e: 葬式 is a funeral (お葬式 = a funeral, 葬式を出す = hold a funeral). Related: 葬儀(そうぎ) = funeral rites (more formal).

ex.jp: 庭の手入れを欠かさない。
ex.en: I never neglect the upkeep of the garden.

qs.s: 革靴は、こまめに＿＿＿＿をすれば長く使える。
qs.en: Leather shoes last a long time with frequent care.
qs.e: 手入れ = upkeep/maintenance/grooming (tending to keep something in good condition). 手間 = trouble/labor required. 手続き = procedures/formalities. 手伝い = help/assistance.

qs.s: 「手入れ」の意味は？
qs.e: 手入れ means tending something to keep it in good shape (肌の手入れ = skincare, 手入れが行き届く = well-maintained). (It can also mean a police raid.)

ex.jp: 彼は市の役人として働いている。
ex.en: He works as a city official.

qs.s: 手続きの件で、市役所の＿＿＿＿に相談した。
qs.en: I consulted a city hall official about the procedure.
qs.e: 役人(やくにん) = a government official/bureaucrat. 商人(しょうにん) = a merchant. 職人 = a craftsman/artisan. 芸人(げいにん) = an entertainer/comedian.

qs.s: 「役人」の意味は？
qs.e: 役人 is someone who works for the government (お役人 = an official, 役人気質 = a bureaucratic temperament). Works at a 役所 (government office).

m: to bury; to fill in/up; to fill (a gap, a seat)

ex.jp: 庭に種を埋めた。
ex.en: I buried the seeds in the garden.

qs.s: 空欄を＿＿＿＿ように、適切な言葉を考えた。
qs.en: I thought of the right word to fill in the blank.
qs.e: 埋める = to bury; to fill in/up (a gap, blank, seat). 空ける(あける) = to empty/make a space. 削る(けずる) = to shave/scrape off; to cut (a budget). 破る(やぶる) = to tear/break.

qs.s: 「埋める」の意味は？
o: to bury; to fill in/up (a gap, a seat)
to empty; to make a space
to shave/scrape off; to cut down
qs.e: 埋める means to bury or fill (穴を埋める = fill a hole, 空白を埋める = fill the blank, 赤字を埋める = cover a deficit). Intransitive: 埋まる.

m: humidity; level of moisture in the air

ex.jp: 梅雨の時期は湿度が高い。
ex.en: Humidity is high during the rainy season.

qs.s: この部屋は＿＿＿＿が低く、肌が乾燥しやすい。
qs.en: This room has low humidity, so skin dries out easily.
qs.e: 湿度 = humidity (moisture in the air). 温度 = temperature. 濃度 = concentration/density (of a substance). 角度 = angle.

qs.s: 「湿度」の意味は？
qs.e: 湿度 measures air moisture (湿度が高い = humid, 湿度計 = a hygrometer). Related: 湿気(しっけ) = dampness.

ex.jp: 森林は二酸化炭素を吸収する。
ex.en: Forests absorb carbon dioxide.

qs.s: 違法な伐採で、世界中の＿＿＿＿が減少している。
qs.en: Due to illegal logging, forests around the world are decreasing.
qs.e: 森林(しんりん) = forest/woods (large-scale, often in environmental contexts). 砂漠(さばく) = a desert. 草原(そうげん) = grassland/prairie. 湿地(しっち) = wetlands/marsh.

qs.s: 「森林」の意味は？
qs.e: 森林 is forest at scale (森林破壊 = deforestation, 森林浴 = forest bathing). 森(もり) is the everyday word for a wood.

m: a short piece (story, film); short work

ex.jp: 彼の短編小説が賞を取った。
ex.en: His short story won an award.

qs.s: 忙しいので、長編ではなく＿＿＿＿の作品を選んで読む。
qs.en: Being busy, I choose short works rather than long ones to read.
qs.e: 短編(たんぺん) = a short work (story/film). 長編(ちょうへん) = a long/full-length work (the opposite). 続編(ぞくへん) = a sequel. 名編 = (rare) a famous piece — not standard; a distractor.

qs.s: 「短編」の意味は？
qs.e: 短編 means a short literary or film work (短編集 = a short-story collection, 短編映画 = a short film). Opposite of 長編.

ex.jp: 中年になって健康が気になり始めた。
ex.en: On reaching middle age, I started worrying about my health.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿の男性が、公園でジョギングをしていた。
qs.en: A middle-aged man was jogging in the park.
qs.e: 中年(ちゅうねん) = middle age (roughly 40s–50s). 青年(せいねん) = a youth/young adult. 少年(しょうねん) = a boy/juvenile. 老人(ろうじん) = an elderly person.

qs.s: 「中年」の意味は？
qs.e: 中年 is middle age (中年太り = middle-age spread). The rough sequence: 少年/青年 → 中年 → 老人.

ex.jp: 彼女は三人姉妹の長女だ。
ex.en: She is the eldest of three sisters.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿として、彼女は幼い弟妹の面倒をよく見た。
qs.en: As the eldest daughter, she looked after her young siblings well.
qs.e: 長女(ちょうじょ) = the eldest daughter. 次女(じじょ) = the second daughter. 長男 = the eldest son. 末っ子(すえっこ) = the youngest child.

qs.s: 「長女」の意味は？
qs.e: 長女 is the first-born daughter (長男・長女 = eldest son and daughter). 次女 = second daughter.

ex.jp: 夏は湖のそばの別荘で過ごす。
ex.en: In summer we stay at the villa by the lake.

qs.s: その実業家は、避暑地に立派な＿＿＿＿を構えている。
qs.en: That businessman has a splendid villa in a summer resort.
qs.e: 別荘(べっそう) = a villa/second home (for vacations). 住居 = a dwelling/one's main residence. 旅館(りょかん) = a traditional Japanese inn. 団地(だんち) = a public housing complex.

qs.s: 「別荘」の意味は？
qs.e: 別荘 is a secondary home for holidays (別荘地 = a resort/cottage area). Distinct from one's primary 住居.

ex.jp: コンサートは屋外で行われた。
ex.en: The concert was held outdoors.

qs.s: 雨天の場合、イベントは＿＿＿＿から屋内に変更される。
qs.en: In case of rain, the event is moved from outdoors to indoors.
qs.e: 屋外(おくがい) = outdoors/outside a building. 屋内(おくない) = indoors (the opposite). 室内(しつない) = inside a room/interior. 車内(しゃない) = inside a vehicle.

qs.s: 「屋外」の意味は？
qs.e: 屋外 means outdoors (屋外活動 = outdoor activities, 屋外駐車場 = an open-air parking lot). Opposite of 屋内.

m: ticket gate; ticket inspection (at a station)

ex.jp: 改札を通って電車に乗る。
ex.en: You pass through the ticket gate to board the train.

qs.s: 友達とは、駅の＿＿＿＿口で待ち合わせた。
qs.en: I met up with my friend at the station ticket gate.
qs.e: 改札(かいさつ) = the ticket gate/ticket inspection. 窓口 = a service window/counter. 出口 = an exit. 階段 = stairs.

qs.s: 「改札」の意味は？
o: ticket gate; ticket inspection at a station
qs.e: 改札 is the station ticket gate (改札口 = the ticket gate, 自動改札 = an automatic ticket gate). You tap your pass there.

ex.jp: 毎朝、血圧を測っている。
ex.en: I measure my blood pressure every morning.

qs.s: 塩分の取りすぎは、＿＿＿＿を上げる原因になる。
qs.en: Consuming too much salt is a cause of raised blood pressure.
qs.e: 血圧(けつあつ) = blood pressure. 体温(たいおん) = body temperature. 脈拍(みゃくはく) = pulse (heart rate). 体重 = body weight.

qs.s: 「血圧」の意味は？
qs.e: 血圧 is blood pressure (高血圧 = high blood pressure, 血圧計 = a blood-pressure monitor).

ex.jp: 彼は日本国籍を取得した。
ex.en: He acquired Japanese nationality.

qs.s: このチームには、様々な＿＿＿＿の選手が在籍している。
qs.en: This team has players of various nationalities.
qs.e: 国籍(こくせき) = nationality/citizenship (legal status). 出身(しゅっしん) = where one is from (origin). 国境(こっきょう) = a national border. 民族(みんぞく) = an ethnic group/people.

qs.s: 「国籍」の意味は？
qs.e: 国籍 is one's legal nationality (二重国籍 = dual nationality, 国籍を変える = change citizenship). 民族 is ethnicity; 出身 is one's place of origin.

ex.jp: 両者の意見には大きな相違がある。
ex.en: There is a big difference between the two parties' opinions.

qs.s: 書類の内容と事実に＿＿＿＿があれば、申し出てください。
qs.en: If there is any discrepancy between the document and the facts, please report it.
qs.e: 相違(そうい) = a difference/discrepancy (a formal term). 一致 = agreement/matching up (the opposite). 共通 = something in common. 同様(どうよう) = the same/likewise.

qs.s: 「相違」の意味は？
qs.e: 相違 is a formal word for a difference/discrepancy (相違点 = points of difference, 〜に相違ない = there's no doubt that ~). Opposite of 一致.

m: the top; summit; peak; apex; climax

ex.jp: 彼はキャリアの頂点に達した。
ex.en: He reached the peak of his career.

qs.s: 優勝して、選手としての人気は＿＿＿＿に達した。
qs.en: After winning, his popularity as a player reached its peak.
qs.e: 頂点(ちょうてん) = the top/summit/apex (highest point). 底辺(ていへん) = the base/bottom (also the lowest social stratum). 中腹(ちゅうふく) = the mountainside/halfway up. 出発点 = the starting point.

qs.s: 「頂点」の意味は？
o: the top; summit; peak; apex; climax
qs.e: 頂点 is the highest point (頂点に立つ = stand at the top, 怒りが頂点に達する = anger reaches its peak). Geometrically also a vertex.

m: capacity; the fixed/maximum number of people allowed

ex.jp: このエレベーターの定員は十名だ。
ex.en: This elevator's capacity is ten people.

qs.s: 講座は＿＿＿＿に達したため、申し込みを締め切った。
qs.en: The course reached capacity, so applications were closed.
qs.e: 定員(ていいん) = the set maximum number of people (capacity). 満員 = being full (no more room, the state). 人数 = the (actual) number of people. 定価 = the list price.

qs.s: 「定員」の意味は？
o: capacity; the fixed maximum number of people
being full; no more room (the state)
qs.e: 定員 is the allowed maximum headcount (定員オーバー = over capacity, 定員割れ = below the quota). When that capacity is reached, it's 満員.

ex.jp: この家具は天然の木材で作られている。
ex.en: This furniture is made of natural wood.

qs.s: 輸入＿＿＿＿の価格が高騰し、住宅の建設費が上がった。
qs.en: The price of imported timber soared, raising housing construction costs.
qs.e: 木材(もくざい) = wood/timber as a material. 材木(ざいもく) = lumber/timber (≒ 木材, often cut for building). 木製(もくせい) = made of wood (an attribute). 樹木(じゅもく) = trees (living, standing).

qs.s: 「木材」の意味は？
qs.e: 木材 is wood as a raw material (木材加工 = woodworking). 樹木 are living trees; 木製 describes a wooden product.

m: this and that; one thing or another; various things

ex.jp: あれこれ考えすぎて眠れない。
ex.en: I overthink this and that and can't sleep.

qs.s: 他人の人生に、＿＿＿＿口出しするべきではない。
qs.en: You shouldn't meddle in this and that of other people's lives.
qs.e: あれこれ = this and that/various things (a range of unspecified matters). めっきり = markedly/noticeably (a sharp change). うっかり = carelessly. きっぱり = flatly/decisively.

qs.s: 「あれこれ」の意味は？
o: this and that; one thing or another; various things
qs.e: あれこれ refers to various unspecified things (あれこれ悩む = fret over all sorts of things, あれこれ言う = say this and that).

ex.jp: 彼は明晰な頭脳の持ち主だ。
ex.en: He has a sharp, clear mind.

qs.s: この仕事は体力よりも＿＿＿＿が要求される。
qs.en: This job demands brains more than physical strength.
qs.e: 頭脳(ずのう) = brains/intellect (mental ability). 筋力(きんりょく) = muscle strength. 体力 = physical strength/stamina. 気力 = willpower/mental energy.

qs.s: 「頭脳」の意味は？
qs.e: 頭脳 means intellectual capacity (頭脳明晰 = sharp-minded, 頭脳労働 = brain work, 頭脳流出 = brain drain).

m: a close friend; being on good terms; good friends

ex.jp: 二人は昔からの仲良しだ。
ex.en: The two have been close friends for a long time.

qs.s: クラスの＿＿＿＿三人組は、いつも一緒に行動している。
qs.en: The class's close-knit trio always acts together.
qs.e: 仲良し(なかよし) = a close friend/being on good terms. 知り合い = an acquaintance (someone you know). ライバル = a rival. 他人 = a stranger/unrelated person.

qs.s: 「仲良し」の意味は？
o: a close friend; being on good terms
qs.e: 仲良し means being close/friendly (仲良くする = get along, 仲良しグループ = a close group of friends).

ex.jp: 人気の商品はすぐ売り切れになる。
ex.en: Popular items sell out quickly.

qs.s: 開演前にチケットは全て＿＿＿＿となった。
qs.en: All the tickets were sold out before the show started.
qs.e: 売り切れ = sold out (an item no longer available). 品切れ(しなぎれ) = out of stock (≒ 売り切れ, stock temporarily depleted). 在庫(ざいこ) = stock/inventory (the goods on hand). 完売(かんばい) = a complete sellout (everything sold).

qs.s: 「売り切れ」の意味は？
qs.e: 売り切れ means an item has all been sold (売り切れ御免 = 'sold out, sorry'). The verb is 売り切れる.

ex.jp: 夜空に無数の星が輝いている。
ex.en: Countless stars shine in the night sky.

qs.s: 砂浜には、＿＿＿＿の小さな貝殻が散らばっていた。
qs.en: Countless small seashells were scattered on the beach.
qs.e: 無数(むすう) = countless/innumerable. 少数(しょうすう) = a small number/minority. 多少(たしょう) = more or less/some. 半数(はんすう) = half the number.

qs.s: 「無数」の意味は？
qs.e: 無数 means too many to count (無数にある = there are countless ones, 無数の星 = countless stars).

m: to compete; to contend; to dispute; to quarrel

ex.jp: 二人は一位を争っている。
ex.en: The two are competing for first place.

qs.s: わずかな遺産を巡って、親族が裁判で＿＿＿＿。
qs.en: The relatives fought in court over the small inheritance.
qs.e: 争う = to compete/contend/dispute (struggle against). 譲る(ゆずる) = to yield/hand over/give way. 支える = to support. 認める = to acknowledge/approve.

qs.s: 「争う」の意味は？
o: to compete; to contend; to dispute; to quarrel
to yield; to give way; to hand over
qs.e: 争う means to struggle or compete against (優勝を争う = vie for the title, 一刻を争う = every second counts). The noun is 争い (a conflict).

m: regrettable; a pity; so close; too good to waste

ex.jp: あと一点で勝てたのに、惜しい試合だった。
ex.en: We could have won by one more point — it was a regrettable game.

qs.s: こんなに立派な物を捨てるなんて、＿＿＿＿。
qs.en: Throwing away such a fine thing is a waste / a pity.
qs.e: 惜しい = regrettable/a pity/so close (too valuable to lose). めでたい = joyous/auspicious. 厳しい = strict/severe. 怪しい = suspicious/doubtful.

qs.s: 「惜しい」の意味は？
o: regrettable; a pity; so close; too good to waste
qs.e: 惜しい expresses regret over a near-miss or waste (惜しい！= so close!, 時間が惜しい = time is too precious to waste, 名残惜しい = sad to part).

ex.jp: 私たちは自然の恩恵を受けている。
ex.en: We receive the blessings of nature.

qs.s: 技術の発展の＿＿＿＿で、生活は格段に便利になった。
qs.en: Thanks to the benefits of technological progress, life has become far more convenient.
qs.e: 恩恵(おんけい) = a benefit/blessing/boon (good one receives). 負担(ふたん) = a burden/load. 被害(ひがい) = damage/harm suffered. 犠牲(ぎせい) = a sacrifice/victim.

qs.s: 「恩恵」の意味は？
qs.e: 恩恵 is a benefit or blessing received (恩恵を受ける = receive benefits, 自然の恩恵 = nature's bounty).

m: answer; solution (to a problem with a correct answer)

ex.jp: 試験の解答を見直す。
ex.en: I review my answers to the exam.

qs.s: この数学の問題の＿＿＿＿は、巻末に載っている。
qs.en: The solution to this math problem is at the back of the book.
qs.e: 解答(かいとう) = the answer/solution to a problem (with a correct answer). 回答 = a reply/response to a question or survey. 質問 = a question. 課題(かだい) = a task/assignment/issue to address.

qs.s: 「解答」の意味は？
o: answer; solution to a problem (with a correct answer)
a reply/response to a question or survey
qs.e: 解答 is solving a problem that has a correct answer (解答用紙 = an answer sheet, 模範解答 = a model answer). 回答 is replying to an inquiry.

ex.jp: 基礎的な学力を身につける。
ex.en: To acquire basic academic ability.

qs.s: この試験は、生徒の＿＿＿＿を客観的に測るためのものだ。
qs.en: This test is meant to objectively measure students' academic ability.
qs.e: 学力(がくりょく) = academic/scholastic ability (knowledge and skill). 体力 = physical strength/stamina. 視力(しりょく) = eyesight/visual acuity. 権力 = (political) power/authority.

qs.s: 「学力」の意味は？
qs.e: 学力 is one's command of academic content (学力テスト = an achievement test, 学力低下 = a decline in academic ability).

ex.jp: この地方は伝統工芸で有名だ。
ex.en: This region is famous for traditional crafts.

qs.s: 陶器や漆器などの伝統＿＿＿＿は、職人の手で作られる。
qs.en: Traditional crafts like pottery and lacquerware are made by artisans' hands.
qs.e: 工芸(こうげい) = crafts/craftwork (artistic handmade objects). 工業 = (manufacturing) industry. 農業 = agriculture. 商業 = commerce/trade.

qs.s: 「工芸」の意味は？
qs.e: 工芸 refers to functional artistic crafts (工芸品 = a craft item, 伝統工芸 = traditional crafts).

m: a housing complex; apartment estate (often public)

ex.jp: 私は大きな団地に住んでいる。
ex.en: I live in a large housing complex.

qs.s: その＿＿＿＿には、何棟もの集合住宅が立ち並んでいる。
qs.en: In that housing complex, many apartment buildings stand in rows.
qs.e: 団地(だんち) = a housing complex/apartment estate (multiple buildings, often public). 別荘 = a villa/vacation home. 住居 = a dwelling (general). 屋敷(やしき) = a (large) mansion/estate house.

qs.s: 「団地」の意味は？
qs.e: 団地 is a planned cluster of apartment buildings (公団住宅) — common postwar public housing (団地住まい = living in a housing complex).

m: easy-going; facile; taking the easy way (often with negative nuance)

ex.jp: 安易な考えで決めてはいけない。
ex.en: You mustn't decide with facile thinking.

qs.s: よく調べもせず、＿＿＿＿に結論を出すのは危険だ。
qs.en: It's dangerous to reach a conclusion too easily without proper investigation.
qs.e: 安易(あんい) = facile/taking the easy way (often criticized as careless). 慎重 = cautious/prudent. 困難(こんなん) = difficult/hardship. 真剣 = serious/earnest.

qs.s: 「安易」の意味は？
o: facile; taking the easy way (often careless)
qs.e: 安易 implies doing something too easily without enough thought (安易な発想 = facile thinking, 安易に妥協する = give in too readily). Note: not just 'easy' (易しい).

m: closure (of business); suspension of operations; a business holiday

ex.jp: 本日は臨時休業します。
ex.en: We are temporarily closed today.

qs.s: 改装工事のため、当店は一週間＿＿＿＿いたします。
qs.en: Due to renovation work, our store will be closed for one week.
qs.e: 休業(きゅうぎょう) = a business closing/suspending operations. 開業(かいぎょう) = opening a business (starting up). 営業(えいぎょう) = doing business/being open. 休憩 = a (short) break/rest.

qs.s: 「休業」の意味は？
o: closure of business; suspension of operations
qs.e: 休業 means a business is closed/not operating (臨時休業 = temporary closure, 休業日 = a closed day). Opposite of 営業 (open for business).

ex.jp: 財布に一万円の紙幣が入っている。
ex.en: There's a 10,000-yen bill in my wallet.

qs.s: 自動販売機は、古い＿＿＿＿を受け付けないことがある。
qs.en: Vending machines sometimes don't accept old banknotes.
qs.e: 紙幣(しへい) = paper money/banknotes. 硬貨(こうか) = coins (metal money). 金額(きんがく) = a monetary amount/sum. 通貨(つうか) = currency (the monetary system, e.g. yen).

qs.s: 「紙幣」の意味は？
qs.e: 紙幣 is paper currency (新紙幣 = new banknotes, 千円紙幣 = a 1,000-yen note). Coins are 硬貨; the currency system is 通貨.

ex.jp: 傷口を消毒する。
ex.en: To disinfect a wound.

qs.s: 店の入り口で、アルコールで手を＿＿＿＿してから入る。
qs.en: At the shop entrance, you sanitize your hands with alcohol before entering.
qs.e: 消毒(しょうどく) = disinfection/sterilization (killing germs). 洗濯 = doing laundry. 掃除 = cleaning (sweeping/wiping). 清掃 = cleaning/sanitation (formal, of public spaces).

qs.s: 「消毒」の意味は？
qs.e: 消毒 means killing germs/disinfecting (消毒液 = disinfectant, 手指消毒 = hand sanitizing). Cleaning of dirt is 掃除/清掃.

ex.jp: この電車は各駅に停車する。
ex.en: This train stops at every station.

qs.s: 急行は小さな駅には＿＿＿＿せず、通過する。
qs.en: The express doesn't stop at small stations; it passes through.
qs.e: 停車(ていしゃ) = stopping (a vehicle coming to a halt). 発車(はっしゃ) = departure (a vehicle setting off). 乗車 = boarding/getting on. 下車(げしゃ) = getting off/alighting.

qs.s: 「停車」の意味は？
qs.e: 停車 is a vehicle stopping (各駅停車 = a local train stopping at every station, 一時停車 = a brief stop). Opposite of 発車.

m: accurate; precise; to the point; apt

ex.jp: 彼の指示はいつも的確だ。
ex.en: His instructions are always to the point.

qs.s: 医師は症状から、病気を＿＿＿＿に判断した。
qs.en: From the symptoms, the doctor accurately diagnosed the illness.
qs.e: 的確(てきかく) = accurate/precise/to the point (hitting the mark). 曖昧(あいまい) = vague/ambiguous. 適当 = suitable; (also) half-hearted/random. 余計 = excessive/uncalled-for.

qs.s: 「的確」の意味は？
o: accurate; precise; to the point; apt
qs.e: 的確 means right on target (的確な判断 = a sound, accurate judgment, 的確に答える = answer precisely). Hits the 的 (target) exactly.

m: distribution; how something is spread out

ex.jp: この植物は世界中に分布している。
ex.en: This plant is distributed all over the world.

qs.s: 人口の＿＿＿＿は、都市部に偏っている。
qs.en: The population distribution is skewed toward urban areas.
qs.e: 分布(ぶんぷ) = distribution (how things are spread across an area/range). 分類 = classification (sorting into categories). 分解 = disassembly/decomposition. 分割 = dividing into portions/installments.

qs.s: 「分布」の意味は？
o: distribution; how something is spread out
qs.e: 分布 describes how things are spread over an area or range (分布図 = a distribution map, 人口分布 = population distribution).

ex.jp: 実験室には危険な薬品がある。
ex.en: There are dangerous chemicals in the lab.

qs.s: これらの＿＿＿＿は、混ぜると有毒なガスが発生する。
qs.en: When these chemicals are mixed, a toxic gas is produced.
qs.e: 薬品(やくひん) = chemicals/medicines (substances). 薬局 = a pharmacy (the shop). 食品(しょくひん) = food products/foodstuffs. 製品 = a finished product.

qs.s: 「薬品」の意味は？
qs.e: 薬品 means chemical substances or medicines (化学薬品 = chemicals, 医薬品 = pharmaceuticals). 薬局 is the pharmacy itself.

ex.jp: 漁師が朝早く船を出した。
ex.en: The fishermen took their boats out early in the morning.

qs.s: この港町には、代々続く＿＿＿＿の家が多い。
qs.en: In this port town there are many families of fishermen going back generations.
qs.e: 漁師(りょうし) = a fisherman (catches fish at sea). 農家(のうか) = a farmer/farming household. 猟師(りょうし) = a hunter (same reading りょうし, different kanji — hunts game). 船長(せんちょう) = a ship's captain.

qs.s: 「漁師」の意味は？
o: a hunter (of game; homophone 猟師)
qs.e: 漁師 catches fish for a living (漁師町 = a fishing village). Beware the homophone 猟師 (りょうし) = a hunter of land game.

m: to pile up; to stack; to layer; to repeat (over and over)

ex.jp: 皿を重ねて棚にしまう。
ex.en: I stack the plates and put them in the cupboard.

qs.s: 練習を＿＿＿＿ことで、彼は見事な技を身につけた。
qs.en: By repeating practice over and over, he mastered an impressive technique.
qs.e: 重ねる = to stack/layer; to repeat (do over and over). 崩す(くずす) = to break down/demolish. 離す(はなす) = to separate/move apart. 分ける = to divide/split.

qs.s: 「重ねる」の意味は？
o: to pile up; to stack; to layer; to repeat over and over
qs.e: 重ねる means to layer or repeat (年を重ねる = grow older, 努力を重ねる = make repeated efforts). Intransitive: 重なる (to overlap/pile up).

ex.jp: 都心には高層ビルが立ち並んでいる。
ex.en: High-rise buildings line the city center.

qs.s: その＿＿＿＿マンションの最上階からは、街が一望できる。
qs.en: From the top floor of that high-rise apartment, you can see the whole city.
qs.e: 高層(こうそう) = high-rise/multistory (many floors up). 低層(ていそう) = low-rise (few floors). 地下(ちか) = underground/basement. 平屋(ひらや) = a single-story house.

qs.s: 「高層」の意味は？
qs.e: 高層 describes tall, many-floored structures (高層ビル = a skyscraper, 高層階 = the upper floors). Also 高層雲 = high-altitude clouds.

ex.jp: 昼食は各自持参してください。
ex.en: Please bring your own lunch.

qs.s: 会場には筆記用具を＿＿＿＿の上、お越しください。
qs.en: Please come to the venue bringing your own writing materials.
qs.e: 持参(じさん) = bringing something with you. 持続(じぞく) = sustaining/lasting (maintaining a state). 参加 = participation/joining in. 参考(さんこう) = reference/consultation (for information).

qs.s: 「持参」の意味は？
qs.e: 持参 means to bring something along (お弁当を持参する = bring your own lunch, 持参金 = a dowry).

m: to come into contact with; to deal with (people); to border/adjoin

ex.jp: 彼は誰にでも優しく接する。
ex.en: He treats everyone kindly.

qs.s: 看護師は、患者に思いやりを持って＿＿＿＿べきだ。
qs.en: Nurses should deal with patients with compassion.
qs.e: 接する = to come into contact with / deal with (people); also to border/adjoin. 逆らう(さからう) = to defy/go against. 逃げる = to flee/escape. 隠れる = to hide.

qs.s: 「接する」の意味は？
o: to come into contact with; to deal with (people); to border
qs.e: 接する means to interact with or be in contact with (人に接する = deal with people, 海に接する町 = a town bordering the sea, 情報に接する = come across information).

ex.jp: 論文を書くために多くの文献を読んだ。
ex.en: I read many references to write the paper.

qs.s: 主張の根拠として、信頼できる＿＿＿＿を引用する。
qs.en: As grounds for the argument, I cite reliable references.
qs.e: 文献(ぶんけん) = (academic) references/literature/sources. 文章(ぶんしょう) = writing/a passage/sentences. 文房具(ぶんぼうぐ) = stationery (pens, etc.). 文字(もじ) = letters/characters.

qs.s: 「文献」の意味は？
qs.e: 文献 means scholarly sources/references (参考文献 = a bibliography/references, 文献調査 = a literature review).

m: a famous place; noted scenic/historic spot

ex.jp: 京都には名所が多い。
ex.en: Kyoto has many famous spots.

qs.s: 観光バスで、市内の＿＿＿＿を一日で巡った。
qs.en: By tour bus, we visited the city's famous sights in one day.
qs.e: 名所(めいしょ) = a famous/scenic place (worth visiting). 名物 = a famous local product/specialty. 名作 = a masterpiece. 名人 = a master/expert.

qs.s: 「名所」の意味は？
o: a famous place; noted scenic/historic spot
qs.e: 名所 is a well-known sightseeing spot (名所旧跡 = scenic spots and historic sites, 名所めぐり = visiting famous places).
